text:
A taboo is something that has been forbidden by society. It may be dangerous, inappropriate, or shocking. It can also be something not allowed by a religion or a government. In Fullmetal Alchemist, the main taboos are made by the government of Amestris for both safety and to stop people from having an immortal army (in the case of human transmutation).
 

The following are the two greatest taboos in Amestrian society:
Human Sacrifice
Human Transmutation
Other more minor taboo's are established by Amestrian society such as:
Transmuting lead into gold
